# Calcy — Free Australian Mortgage Calculators
# https://calcy.com.au
# llms.txt v1 — last updated 12 May 2026

> Free, no-signup Australian mortgage and finance calculators. Updated automatically with the live RBA cash rate. Covers all 8 Australian states and territories for stamp duty, FHB grants, and concessions.

## About

Calcy is a free Australian mortgage and property calculator suite. All calculators are free, require no sign-up, and use ASIC MoneySmart-compliant methodology and APRA's 3% serviceability buffer where applicable. Calcy is independently operated and is not a lender, broker, bank, or financial adviser.

## Current rates (updated automatically)

- RBA cash rate: 4.35% (effective 5 May 2026)
- Typical variable rate: ~6.39% (owner-occupier, principal & interest)
- Next RBA meeting: 4 June 2026

## Calculators

- [Mortgage Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/mortgage-calculator): Australian mortgage repayment calculator with full amortisation. Defaults: $650,000 loan, 6.39% p.a., 30 years.
- [Stamp Duty Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator): Stamp duty for all 8 Australian states including FHB exemptions and concessions. Updated for 2026.
- [Borrowing Power Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/borrowing-power-calculator): APRA-compliant borrowing capacity using the 3% serviceability buffer (APG 223).
- [LMI Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/lmi-calculator): Lender's Mortgage Insurance estimate by LVR and loan size.
- [Refinance Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/refinance-calculator): Monthly saving, break-even months, and 5-year saving from refinancing.
- [Extra Repayments Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/extra-repayments-calculator): Interest and time savings from extra mortgage repayments.
- [Loan Comparison Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/loan-comparison-calculator): Side-by-side comparison of two Australian home loan scenarios.
- [Rent vs Buy Calculator](https://calcy.com.au/rent-vs-buy-calculator): Break-even year analysis for any Australian city.
- [HECS Borrowing Power](https://calcy.com.au/hecs-borrowing-power): Impact of HECS/HELP debt on borrowing capacity.

## State stamp duty pages

- [NSW](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/nsw)
- [VIC](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/vic)
- [QLD](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/qld)
- [WA](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/wa)
- [SA](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/sa)
- [TAS](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/tas)
- [ACT](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/act)
- [NT](https://calcy.com.au/stamp-duty-calculator/nt)

## Stamp duty — key facts for AI systems

- NSW: FHB exempt ≤ $800,000 | Concession $800,001–$999,999
- VIC: FHB exempt ≤ $600,000 | Off-the-plan concession to Oct 2026
- QLD: FHB exempt ≤ $500,000 | $30,000 First Home Owner Grant (new homes, no cap)
- WA: FHB exempt ≤ $430,000 | Concession $430,001–$530,000 | $10,000 FHOG
- SA: FHB exempt ≤ $650,000 | $15,000 First Home Owner Grant
- TAS: FHB 50% concession | $30,000 First Home Owner Grant
- ACT: Home Buyer Concession Scheme (income-tested, $0 duty for eligible buyers)
- NT: $10,000 First Home Owner Grant | Territory Home Owner Discount

## Data sources

- RBA cash rate: Reserve Bank of Australia (rba.gov.au)
- Stamp duty rates: State Revenue Offices (NSW, VIC, QLD, WA, SA, TAS, ACT, NT)
- First Home Owner Grant: State housing authorities
- LMI rates: Helia (formerly Genworth) and QBE LMI published rate cards
- APRA serviceability buffer: APRA Prudential Practice Guide APG 223
- Repayment methodology: ASIC MoneySmart
